error: postcondition not satisfied

19 |           result as int == partial_dot(a@, b@, a@.len() as int),
   |           ----------------------------------------------------- failed this postcondition
20 | / {
21 | |     let mut sum: u32 = 0;
22 | |     for i in 0..a.len() {
23 | |         sum += (a[i] as u32) * (b[i] as u32);
24 | |     }
25 | |     sum
